probes.name: marketing-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms every migration this module ships has run: marketing_events, marketing_deliveries, marketing_provider_configs, marketing_dead_letters, plus their indexes (per-tenant deduplication_key unique partial index; delivery next_retry_at index).

probes.name: marketing-dedup-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the composite unique partial index on (tenant_id, deduplication_key) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL exists on marketing_events. Missing this index makes deduplication a table-scan — every capture becomes O(N) — and permits duplicate captures under race conditions.

probes.name: marketing-provider-drivers-registered
probes.description: Confirms every advertised provider (via #[AsMarketingProvider]) is registered with the MarketingProviderManager + its createXxxDriver factory resolves without errors. Fails hard when a provider driver class is missing.

probes.name: marketing-provider-schemas-loaded
probes.description: Confirms every data/providers/<provider>-config.schema.json is present + parseable. Missing schemas would make provider config create silently accept invalid credentials.

probes.name: marketing-pending-event-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 1000 marketing_events rows are in status='pending' for > 60 min. Indicates DispatchMarketingEventJob has stalled.

probes.name: marketing-dispatching-event-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 500 marketing_events rows are in status='dispatching' for > 60 min. Indicates DispatchToProviderJob workers have stalled or the retry sweep is not running.

probes.name: marketing-open-circuit-breakers
probes.description: Reads the count of marketing_provider_configs with circuit_breaker_open_until IS NOT NULL AND > now(). Non-zero indicates at least one tenant × provider has ad-network dispatch degraded. Every open breaker over 24h is a P1 signal.

probes.name: marketing-unresolved-dead-letters
probes.description: Counts marketing_dead_letters rows with resolved_at IS NULL. Every unresolved dead letter is a paid conversion loss — the tenant should investigate. Health probe threshold: 100 unresolved warns; 1000 alerts.

probes.name: marketing-dispatch-failure-rate
probes.description: Reads the trailing 15-minute per-provider failure rate. > 10% failure rate on ANY provider triggers a warning. > 25% triggers an alert.

probes.name: marketing-reconciler-recent
probes.description: Confirms ReconcileMarketingEventStatusJob completed within the last 48 hours (nightly cadence + 24h slop). Stale reconciler indicates scheduler drift.

probes.name: marketing-encryption-key-rotated
probes.description: Warns when the encryption key used for marketing_provider_configs.config has not been rotated in > 90 days. Delegated to the compliance/encryption service's rotation cadence.

probes.name: marketing-provider-health-per-tenant
probes.description: For each (tenant, provider) with is_active=true: reports success_rate + circuit_breaker_state + last_success_at. Feeds the platform ops dashboard.
